apiVersion: v1
kind: Config
current-context: k0s
clusters:
  - cluster:
      server: https://192.168.1.100:6443
      certificate-authority-data: ca-base64
    name: k0s
  - cluster:
      server: https://backup:6443
    name: backup
users:
  - name: admin
    user:
      client-certificate-data: cert-base64
      client-key-data: key-base64
contexts:
  - context:
      cluster: k0s
      user: admin
    name: k0s
